name: Lionel Loueke
abstract: Lionel Loueke (born 27 April 1973) is a guitarist and vocalist born in Benin. He moved to Ivory Coast in 1990 to study at the National Institute of Art.

about_quotes.speaker: Jack DeJohnette
about_quotes.evidence: The people that I had in mind to do this project were: Esperanza Spalding, Lionel Loueke... That was the personnel and we just finished recording.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jack DeJohnette — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Kenny Barron
about_quotes.evidence: Lionel I met at the Monk Institute... So I got to hear Lionel a lot... Lionel also [played on a few tracks on The Traveler].
about_quotes.doc_title: Kenny Barron — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
